name: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited
summary: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited provides various general insurance products and services in India. The company offers motor, car, two wheeler, health, health booster, personal accident, international travel, home, marine, workmen compensation, NRI, business, third party, crop, rural, and cyber insurance products; and provides reinsurance services. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Mumbai, India. ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited is a subsidiary of ICICI Bank Limited.
